title: Wire the 2D renderer into scene-driven fixtures
description: Move rendering validation from synthetic framebuffer tests to scene-driven golden fixtures. Acceptance criteria: at least one .tscn scene produces golden-compared output and validates camera, transforms, ordering, texture draws, and visibility end to end.

title: Replace manual parity plumbing with generated oracle artifacts
description: Move parity tests to generated upstream-backed goldens. Acceptance criteria: oracle tests consume fixtures from fixtures/golden, each test states the observable contract it compares, and stale/missing goldens fail clearly.

title: Make frame processing semantics match Godot contracts
description: Align process, physics_process, pause, and fixed-step behavior with Godot. Acceptance criteria: frame sequencing is specified and tested, and oracle fixtures validate frame-by-frame property evolution rather than only end-state values.

title: Pin upstream Godot and record oracle version
description: Add the upstream Godot pin as the authoritative oracle source. Acceptance criteria: upstream is pinned, TEST_ORACLE.md records version/commit/date, and repo setup docs explain how to sync/update the pin.

title: Create tools/oracle capture tooling
description: Build the scene/property/signal/notification/resource/render/physics oracle entrypoints. Acceptance criteria: each capture type in TEST_ORACLE.md has a concrete tool entrypoint and at least one scene and one resource fixture can generate golden outputs.

title: Stand up apps/godot GDExtension compatibility lab
description: Create the missing Godot lab for Rust-in-Godot contract validation. Acceptance criteria: apps/godot builds as a GDExtension project, Godot loads it, and smoke probes emit machine-readable outputs for scene, resource, and signal behavior.
